_comment: Plugin hook wiring. The PreToolUse hook intercepts the custom submit_review MCP tool, captures the real diff + PR metadata, opens the review UI, and BLOCKS until the reviewer is done (long timeout = 4 days). Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} + bun so it runs from a local --plugin-dir with no global install. PreToolUse is chosen over PermissionRequest because it always fires, even in auto-accept modes. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
